Old Apple orchard at St. Mary's University. This used to be part of the working farm that fed the University. Access: Private. Falling Fruit season: September-September.
Walnut tree by volleyball nets at St. Mary’s
Very thorny, decent fruit. Might have to fight off the old Polish ladies from the east end who come to pick them. Access: Private. Falling Fruit season: July-August.
Old Pear Orchard at St. Mary's University. Access: Private.

about 4-5 "Dolgo" crab apples mixed in with some other crab apples. Dolgos are great for jelly and ok for wine/cider. They get sweeter as they soften. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: August-September.
Half a dozen large Black Walnut trees. Access: Private but overhanging.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.

"Black cap" raspberries. Wild-type fruit. Very seedy. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: June-July.

"Black cap" raspberry. Nice big patch on the open end of the field. This is part of the wildlife refuge. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: June-July.
